CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, dateString String);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates WHERE parsedDate = 0;
CREATE TABLE processed_dates AS SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates;
SELECT id FROM processed_dates WHERE parsedDate != 0;
CREATE TABLE valid_dates AS SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates WHERE parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) != 0;
SELECT id, dateString FROM test_dates WHERE dateString LIKE '%invalid%';
SELECT id, dateString FROM test_dates WHERE dateString NOT LIKE '%invalid%' AND parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) = 0;

CREATE TABLE date_ranges AS SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) AS parsedDate FROM test_dates WHERE parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00') AND toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59');
SELECT id, dateString FROM test_dates WHERE parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrZero(dateString) > 0 ORDER BY parsedDate DESC;
